description: CompositionBlue shirt top made of woven 100% cotton, has a stand collar, full length buttoned placket, mini cap sleeves, pin-tucks from the midriff, gathers at the back waist and a curved hemFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, jeans and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
